EXPANDING CAPACITY WITH BATTERY PACK
====================================

.. TODO(内容团队): 加电包扩容章节骨架 — 由能力配置(加电包扩容=TRUE)选配。
   参照盘点: JE-2000E 最多 5×Battery Pack 2000, 主机开关联动, LCD 显示扩容状态。
   填入: 连接步骤图、支持的加电包型号与数量、充放电行为、注意事项。

| Connect the Battery Pack to the expansion port of |PRODUCT_NAME| to expand the available capacity.
| Refer to the Battery Pack user manual for detailed installation and safety instructions.

.. list-table::
   :header-rows: 0
   :widths: 12 88

   * - **NOTE**
     -
       - Only use Jackery Battery Packs specified for this product.
       - The product manages charging and discharging of connected Battery Packs automatically.
